scripts.schema:gen:ts: quicktype --src-lang schema --lang ts --top-level Sailing --just-types data/schema/sailing.schema.json -o shared/models/ts/sailing.ts && quicktype --src-lang schema --lang ts --top-level Deal --just-types data/schema/deal.schema.json -o shared/models/ts/deal.ts && node scripts/postprocess-ts-models.mjs
scripts.schema:gen:dart: quicktype --src-lang schema --lang dart --top-level Sailing --use-freezed data/schema/sailing.schema.json -o shared/models/dart/lib/sailing.dart && quicktype --src-lang schema --lang dart --top-level Deal --use-freezed data/schema/deal.schema.json -o shared/models/dart/lib/deal.dart
scripts.schema:gen: pnpm run schema:gen:ts && pnpm run schema:gen:dart
